programs.title: Sleeping Dogs
programs.desc: Suffering from memory loss, a former homicide detective tries to solve a brutal murder that he can't recall. As he pieces together evidence from a decade-old investigation, he soon uncovers a sinister web of buried secrets tied to his forgotten past.

programs.title: The Penguin Lessons
programs.desc: An Englishman experiences personal and political changes after adopting a penguin during a turbulent time in Argentina's history.

programs.title: Paseo
programs.desc: A woman becomes displaced and alienated by her surroundings while traveling through Spain. She begins to lose control of her emotional and psychological self as she explores another possible life.

programs.title: Carrot Cake Murder: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programs.desc: Much to the dismay of her fiance, Hannah investigates the discovery of a skeleton found amid the rubble of a building that's undergoing renovation.

programs.title: A Beautiful Place to Die: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programs.desc: After being forced into early retirement, former detective Jeff Jackson returns to a quiet life on Martha's Vineyard. Quiet, at least, until a body washes up and he's drawn back into crime solving.

programs.title: Triumph: Rock & Roll Machine
programs.desc: The story of underdog Canadian rock band Triumph, which rose to stardom in the 1970s and '80s only to disappear at the height of its fame.
